content:
Building a Real-Time Price Comparison API with Node.js — Free Tier Included

Are you tired of manually checking prices across Carousell, Amazon, and other marketplaces? Do you wish there was a simple API that could search product prices across multiple platforms at once?

Well, I built exactly that — PricePulse API — and it's now live and ready for you to use.

What is PricePulse?

PricePulse is a lightweight, RESTful API that aggregates real-time product listings and prices from Carousell Singapore and Amazon Singapore, all through a single unified endpoint.

Head over to https://pricepulseapi.site and start building.
